our story

Painted by Hand,
Poured with Heart

✦

Jaipur is the Pink City — but step inside Cafe Bluez and you're in its blue heart. Every wall is hand-painted in the old Rajasthani fresco style: vines, lotuses, and a butterfly that guests can't stop photographing.

The kitchen wanders just as freely as the brushwork — North Indian tandoor classics, wok-tossed Chinese, wood-style pizzas, Thai curries, and a coffee bar that takes its espresso seriously.

Come for a quiet cappuccino under the arches, stay for dinner on the checkered floor.

150+
